name: Shrimp with Sweet Red Pepper and Cucumber
recipeIngredient: 1 Cucumber, pared and sliced (1/4 inch thickness)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and slice all ingredients as needed.
2. Heat oil in a wok over medium heat. Add shrimp and onion to the hot oil and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until the shrimp turn white.
3. Add sliced cucumber, soya sauce, sugar, and salt. Stir well.
4. Cover the wok and cook for an additional 3 minutes, lifting the cover occasionally to stir the ingredients.
5. Lift the cover and add the red pepper. Continue cooking everything together for 2 more minutes.
6. Stir all ingredients thoroughly before serving.
Note: Chicken can be substituted for shrimp if desired.
